title: Evaluation of the Office for Value for Money
body: "HM Treasury has evaluated the impact of the Office for Value for Money’s (OVfM) work. The evaluation assesses whether the OVfM has delivered its intended remit, whether its work is likely to have a lasting impact, and whether it was a good use of resources. It takes as a starting point the OVfM’s Evaluation Plan published in March 2025. "
